events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: the flexible gas connector was routed through the cabinet wall itself instead of rigid pipe — connectors must stay confined and exposed within the single room/enclosure of the appliance, not bridge through a wall penetration. That's a `fail`, high risk (concealed, unprotected gas line), requiring the connector removed, rigid pipe extended through the wall with an accessible shutoff installed in the water heater's own space, and the assembly leak-tested before the unit returns to service.
